rationale: Function `my_handler` is static + has zero direct callers, but is registered as a callback in `struct ops_t my_ops = { .handler = my_handler, };`. PR-4's function_inventory.cocci doesn't see this as a `call:my_handler` (it only tracks `funcname(args)`). The axis-7 dead-code pass MUST detect the vtable assignment via `_function_referenced_as_pointer` and skip suppression. Verdict UNCERTAIN. Tests the pointer-ref guard end-to-end.
